evidence_rows.interpretation: RGB/motion rank gate catches most sampled hard and high-payload labels, but precision is modest.
evidence_rows.next_action: Proceed, but keep false-negative controls in the next protocol.

evidence_rows.interpretation: Adaptive adds keyframes over uniform gap8 but remains much smaller than uniform gap4.
evidence_rows.next_action: Audit extra-keyframe rate before larger rendering.

evidence_rows.interpretation: Stage166 proxy suggests residual-payload savings can outweigh extra keyframe cost, but this is not yet final accounting.

evidence_rows.metric: adaptive delta vs uniform_gap8 PSNR / LPIPS
evidence_rows.interpretation: False negatives are essentially unchanged from uniform gap8, so adaptive does not fix missed hard cases.
evidence_rows.next_action: Keep false negatives in medium validation and do not scale directly to full validation yet.

evidence_rows.interpretation: Promoted adaptive targets are transmitted keyframes; no middle-render metrics are claimed, and expensive uniform-gap8 residual recovery is avoided on these rows.
evidence_rows.next_action: Continue marking promoted targets as keyframes/no-middle-render.

evidence_rows.interpretation: On the small residual-control slice, adaptive residual rows are not worse than uniform gap8.
evidence_rows.next_action: Expand this control category in Stage173/174.

evidence_rows.interpretation: Current rendered evidence is intentionally sampled and cannot justify final full-sequence claims alone.
evidence_rows.next_action: Use Stage173 medium protocol before any full-sequence validation.

do_not_claim: rendered middle metrics for adaptive keyframe targets
